{{Quote|Master Skywalker and Master Katarn have left the academy. I have been instructed to provide you with a set of possible missions.|Jedi Praxeum protocol droid to [[Jaden Korr]]|<ref name="Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>}}
The '''Jedi Praxeum protocol droid''' was a golden [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] deployed in [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]].

It once greeted [[Kyle Katarn]] in the hangar bay of the Praxeum upon his arrival, informing him that Skywalker was waiting upstairs.<ref name="Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref>

By [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], this droid routinely briefed students on missions when Luke or Kyle were not available, namely the [[mission to Nar Kreeta]], [[Mission to Zonju V|Zonju V]] and [[Mission to Dosuun|Dosuun]].<ref name="Academy" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Jedi Praxeum protocol is canonical, as it appears in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'', but has not been named. It has some dialogue with the player. Although it resembles [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], it is not him, as its voice is much lower.

This article assumes that the same droid appears in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''
